penalties.description: This appears to be an instructional video demonstrating Mishra's knot technique rather than an FLS task performance. No FLS trainer, Penrose drain, or suture targets are visible.

consensus_score.reasoning: Both models identified this as not being a valid FLS task5 performance. Claude correctly identified it as an instructional demonstration of Mishra's knot technique without FLS equipment. GPT-4o cited poor lighting but both agreed no valid task was performed. The incomplete_task penalty results in automatic zero score.

disagreements.rationale: Claude's assessment that this is an instructional video rather than an FLS task is more accurate than GPT's lighting complaint. The video clearly shows hands demonstrating knot technique without FLS equipment.
Since this is not a valid FLS task performance, no completion time should be recorded. The incomplete_task penalty automatically results in zero score regardless of time.
Incomplete task penalty results in automatic zero score per FLS rubric, regardless of any time calculations.
